edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:111d59e34725
edges.original_sentence: Seedlings in soil-mixed plots had significantly higher growth and foliar nutrient concentrations than nonmixed plots, likely because soil mixing improved the substrate conditions by increased soil moisture, pH, and litter decomposition.
